heading: Reward for information leading to recoveries or civil penalties
label: 1790c Reward for information leading to recoveries or civil penalties
text: The Board may pay rewards in connection with an offense affecting an insured credit union, under the same circumstances and subject to the same limitations that a Federal banking agency may pay rewards under in connection with an offense affecting a depository institution insured by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation.section 1831j of this title
